name: rate-limit
description: Rate limiting with @nestjs/throttler backed by Redis (correct across API replicas). Installs a global throttler guard; configurable via env.
env: # rate limit (window in seconds, max requests per window per client)
# higher ceiling for SSR runtime settings reads (maintenance, sign-up, branding)
instructions: Ensure Redis is running:  docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d
Exceeding the limit returns HTTP 429. Skip a route with @SkipThrottle() or tune it with @Throttle().
The limit is shared across API replicas because it is stored in Redis.
PodoKit's web proxy forwards the resolved client address, so visitors receive independent counters.
